title: Bazarre
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the space station|the comic issue [[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]]}} {{Otheruses|Bazaar}} {{SpaceStation |image=[[File:Bazarre.jpg]] |name=Bazarre |designer= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |type=[[Space station/Legends|Space station]][[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length= |width= |height= |diameter= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine= |hyperdrive= |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament= |complement=*[[Orion Ferret's shuttle]] *Various amounts of visiting spacecraft |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |region=*[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030724takedown|text=Zygerrian Takedown|int=Zygerrian Takedown}} *[[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the portions of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] that fall in grid square M-6 in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]]. |sector=[[Cademimu sector/Legends|Cademimu sector]] |system=[[Mosu system]] |coordinates=M-6{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |xyz= |orbited= |distance= |routes= |role=Trading post |affiliation= |constructed= |destroyed= |retired= |battles= |owners=[[Orion Ferret]] |namedcrew=*[[P'Lor]] *[[Quad-Lo]] |captains= |registry= |aliases= |population= |interest= |services= |sectors= |modules= }} {{Quote|…What the blazes is that?"
"It's our destination, Lando. Our best hope of hurting the Empire as badly as they've hurt us. It's—''Bazarre!''|Lando Calrissian and Luke Skywalker|}} '''''Bazarre''''' was a large [[Space station/Legends|space station]] that served as a popular [[Black market/Legends|black market]] and [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]]. Located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Cademimu sector/Legends|Cademimu sector]] by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], ''Bazarre'' was owned by gunrunner [[Orion Ferret]], who fostered an environment where almost anything could be bought and sold aboard the station, including [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], Ferret attempted to betray and [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leaders [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] over a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] deal aboard ''Bazarre'', but his plot was discovered and foiled. ==Characteristics== {{Quote|Security is vital in running an operation like ''Bazarre'', and my guards occasionally get overzealous.|Orion Ferret|}} A massive [[Space station/Legends|space station]] with a distinct [[Color/Legends|gold]] exterior, ''Bazarre'' was known as a major market where seemingly anything could be bought and sold, and attracted a high number of visitors from many different [[Species/Legends|species]]. Trades illegal throughout many parts of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] were permitted on ''Bazarre''—[[Slavery/Legends|slave]] auctions were conducted openly on the trading floor, and there was at least one [[Spice/Legends|spice]] booth open on the station. However, most business conducted on ''Bazarre'' was actually legal, and it was frequented by the galaxy's rich. The station held large Trade Shows that were highly attended by peoples from every corner of the galaxy, including representatives from the reclusive [[S'kytri]], who would sell trinkets and perform dramatic recreations of their [[Initiation Hunt]]s.{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}} Bazarre was especially renowned for its selection of high-tech explosives, including [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]]-made [[talking bomb]]s.{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040930bespinmain|text=Bespin: Action Tidings|int=Bespin: Action Tidings}} The station's interiors were lavishly appointed, with owner [[Orion Ferret]]'s apartments being particularly luxurious. Ferret's quarters on ''Bazarre'' even had their own [[Prison/Legends|prison]], consisting of a [[spritzer]] unit meant to ensnare foes. Ferret put a heavy emphasis on security, operating a large force of guards that were known to sometimes get violent towards unknown visitors. ==History== {{Quote|By now, you hairy nuisance, your friends are gone. Nullified! Dead! While you, dear fellow, shall bring me a tidy profit on the auction block! And, I might add, there's not a thing you can do about it!|Orion Ferret, after imprisoning Chewbacca aboard ''Bazarre''|}} [[File:Bazarre_interior_MC58.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The interior of ''Bazarre''.]] Centuries old by the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the space station known as ''Bazarre'' was known for generations as a [[Black market/Legends|black market]] and [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] of indeterminate origin. Although it had set up for business at several different locations, by the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]], it had become located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Mosu system]], on the edge of the [[Cademimu sector/Legends|Cademimu sector]]. By that time, ''Bazarre'' was owned and operated by a [[Human/Legends|Human]] named Orion Ferret, a noted gunrunner with an untrustworthy reputation in underworld circles. Ferret controlled ''Bazarre'' with the help of a [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] aide named [[P'Lor]], who monitored incoming messages using a [[Cybernetics/Legends|computer implant]] in his head. At the height of the war, ''Bazarre'' visited by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] leaders [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who arrived to finish brokering a deal with Ferret for four [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]]. Ferret planned on swindling Calrissian and Skywalker, [[Death/Legends|killing]] them while keeping the valuable merchandise for himself, but his plans were discovered by their partner [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]. The furious [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] chased Ferret through ''Bazarre''{{'s}} corridors and captured the man, but Skywalker and Calrissian returned unharmed, cargo in tow, and convinced the Wookiee not to kill Ferret. ''Bazarre'' played host to many other sizable deals during this era, including [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] arms merchant [[Lernik De'Yago]]'s sale of the [[Cargo hauler/Legends|cargo hauler]] and former Rebel medical transport ''[[Nova Whisper]]'' to an on-station [[Starship/Legends|starship]] dealer.''[[Stock Ships]]'' ==Behind the scenes== ''Bazarre'' first appeared in [[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' 58]], written by [[David Michelinie]], illustrated by [[Walter Simonson]] and released in [[1982]].[[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]] It went on to be the main setting of the [[Star Wars (1977) 59|following issue]] of the original [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel ''Star Wars'']] comic series. ==Appearances== *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030724takedown|text=Zygerrian Takedown|int=Zygerrian Takedown}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 58}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 59|''Star Wars'' (1977) 59]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 59}} ==Sources== *''[[Stock Ships]]'' {{ID|Bazaar}} *{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}} *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040930bespinmain|text=Bespin: Action Tidings|int=Bespin: Action Tidings}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Bazarre (Raumstation) }} [[Category:Cademimu sector locations]] [[Category:Markets]] [[Category:Space stations in the New Territories]] [[Category:Space stations in the Outer Rim Territories]]
